seed_problem: Assign drones to delivery zones under per-drone capacity to maximize served weight; checker validates capacities and scores total value / baseline.
mutation: input+output: generalize the plain bipartite capacity assignment into a full generalized assignment problem (agent-dependent resource costs e_ij, per-drone energy budgets, at-most-one carrier per parcel) so the optimum is NP-hard and greedy / best-fit / eviction-swap / repacking local search strategies diverge.
title: Skybridge Fulfillment: Drone Payload Dispatch
strategies: first-fit baseline: assign each parcel in input order to the lowest-index drone with remaining budget
value/cost greedy: sort parcels by value divided by cheapest energy cost, assign each to its feasible min-cost drone
eviction-swap local search: from a greedy start, place unassigned high-value parcels by evicting cheaper lower-value ones when total value strictly increases
multi-start repacking: run greedy under several parcel orderings and keep the packing that maximizes total delivered value
